home.title: Welcome to RefugeeSupport.am
home.subtitle: Thousands of refugees in Armenia are seeking housing, healthcare, legal aid, and more. Find trusted support services near you — confidential, free, and easy to access.
home.latestServicesSubtitle: Choose from a range of available services
home.ctaTitle: Haven't found the right service yet?
home.ctaSubtitle: Tell us what your needs are and you will be contacted and provided with the available resources.

needs.title: Need reports
needs.submitSuccess: Thank you. Your need has been submitted.

services.title: Support services
services.subtitle: Browse available support services across Armenia
services.noResults: No services found matching your criteria

about.title: About RefugeeSupport.am
about.intro: RefugeeSupport.am is a platform connecting refugees and displaced people in Armenia with verified support services provided by trusted organisations.
about.missionText: We believe everyone deserves access to essential services — housing, healthcare, legal aid, education, and more. Our platform makes it easy to find, compare, and connect with the right support.
about.step1Text: Find services by topic, region, or keyword. Use the map to explore what's available near you.
about.step2Text: View detailed service information and contact the providing organisation directly.
about.step3Text: Can't find what you need? Submit a need report and we'll connect you with available resources.
about.builtBy: Built with care by Code for Romania, in partnership with local organisations across Armenia.

joinNetwork.title: Join the network
joinNetwork.subtitle: Are you an organisation providing support services to refugees in Armenia? Join our network to reach the people who need you.
joinNetwork.benefit1Text: Your services will be listed on our platform, making them discoverable to thousands of refugees and displaced people.
joinNetwork.benefit2Text: Use our dashboard to add, update, and manage your service listings. Track assigned need reports.
joinNetwork.benefit3Text: Receive need report assignments and connect directly with people who need your support.
joinNetwork.ctaText: To join the network, contact us at the email address below. We will set up your organisation account and provide access credentials.
